message:
fix(dep): Fix test function naming conventions

- Fix test function names broken by overly aggressive search-replace
  - test_dep_action_resultjson -> test_dep_action_result_json
  - test_dep_list_itemjson -> test_dep_list_item_json
  - test_cycles_resultjson -> test_cycles_result_json
- Add skip_cache_rebuild field to benchmark IssueUpdate
- Improve ready.rs width calculation with UnicodeWidthStr
- Add new e2e tests for history operations
- Various formatting fixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -82,7 +82,7 @@ struct SyncPathPolicy {
 /// Returns an error if the database cannot be opened or the sync operation fails.
 pub fn execute(
     args: &SyncArgs,
-    _json: bool,
+    json: bool,
     cli: &config::CliOverrides,
     ctx: &OutputContext,
 ) -> Result<()> {
@@ -107,7 +107,7 @@ pub fn execute(
 
     // Handle --status flag
     if args.status {
-        return execute_status(&storage, &path_policy, _json, ctx);
+        return execute_status(&storage, &path_policy, json, ctx);
     }
 
     // Validate mutually exclusive modes
